title: Add email + password form to /login
description: Add the email and password fields plus login submit button to login.html.
acceptance_criteria: Form has email (type=email) and password (type=password) fields
Error message element present (hidden by default)
technical_notes: No 'Forgot password' link in Phase 1 scope. The error element should handle 'Invalid login credentials' from Supabase gracefully — display as 'Incorrect email or password.'
